content: By integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into the iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine, we can create a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that outperforms both original approaches without requiring additional training or external supervision. This framework leverages perspective inconsistency to surface blind spots the original single-perspective Self-Refine would miss, while retaining Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra data or training.
